name: HRT_PROFILE_BESTFIT_RESULT
description: This table is used to populate the matching best fit results for the Profiles

columns.Name: BESTFIT_RESULT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique Identifier for Best Fit Match Results

columns.Name: TARGET_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Target Profile ID of Person or Model Profile

columns.Name: TARGET_PROFILE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Target Profile Type ID of Person or Model Profile

columns.Name: TARGET_PROFILE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Target Profile Type Code of Person or Model Profile

columns.Name: SEARCH_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Search Instance ID of Person or Model profile

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: PERSON ID of a Person Profile

columns.Name: SOURCE_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: Source Profile ID of Person or Model Profile

columns.Name: SOURCE_PROFILE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Source Profile Type ID of Person or Model Profile

columns.Name: SOURCE_PROFILE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Source Profile Type Code of Person or Model Profile

columns.Name: COMPETENCY_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching score for Comptencies

columns.Name: LANGUAGE_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching score for Languages

columns.Name: CERTIFICATION_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching score for Certification

columns.Name: AWARDS_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching score for Awards

columns.Name: MEMBERSHIP_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching score for Membership

columns.Name: DEGREE_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching score for Degrees

columns.Name: WORKREQ_SCORE
columns.Comments: Matching score for Work Requirements

columns.Name: WEIGHTED_SCORE
columns.Comments: Overall Weighted Matching Score

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning.
